candidate_problems.text: What precise underlying framework could make quantum information/relational structure fundamental while deriving both spacetime geometry and quantum dynamics as emergent approximations, rather than merely replacing one primitive with another?

How can a theory without fixed background spacetime define coherence, evolution, and measurement consistently—i.e., what replaces standard unitarity, causal order, and subsystem decomposition when the stage itself is in quantum superposition?

Why does the emergent gravitational sector couple universally to all forms of energy/information, and can black-hole/horizon thermodynamics be derived from the same mechanism that yields approximate locality and classical spacetime?
